about.title: A story of timeless elegance
about.text: Lumière Kyiv is a place where culinary tradition meets modern creativity. Every dish is carefully crafted with the finest ingredients, creating an unforgettable dining experience.

hero.subtitle: A journey of exceptional taste
hero.description: Where culinary art meets timeless elegance. Discover an unforgettable fine dining experience.
